title: Incorrect items on credit report
description: I requested validation of several accounts that do not belong to me. The bureau has not removed them after 45 days.

title: Harassing debt collection calls
description: Collector calls my workplace multiple times daily after I asked them to stop. They disclosed the debt to my supervisor.

title: Unauthorized charges on card
description: I reported fraudulent online charges within 24 hours but the issuer denied my dispute without explanation.

title: Mortgage escrow shortage
description: My escrow increased sharply without notice; the servicer miscalculated taxes and now demands a large lump sum.

title: Student loan payment misapplied
description: Extra payments were not applied to principal as agreed; balances and interest do not match my records.

title: Checking account holds
description: Bank placed a long hold on a deposited check without clear disclosure of when funds would be available.

title: Auto loan payoff amount wrong
description: Payoff quote did not match what was charged at closing; lender added unexplained fees.

title: Medical debt on credit report
description: Balance already paid to provider still appears as open with the collection agency.

title: Rewards points disappeared
description: Travel rewards vanished after program change; customer service cannot restore prior balance.

title: ATM fee not disclosed
description: Out-of-network ATM charged multiple fees not shown on screen before withdrawal.

title: Mortgage modification denial
description: Servicer lost documents twice; now claims I missed deadlines for assistance programs.

title: Identity theft alert ignored
description: I placed a fraud alert but a new account was still opened without verification.

title: Debt validation not provided
description: Collector cannot verify original creditor or amount but continues reporting negative status.

title: Prepaid card funds missing
description: Balance dropped after maintenance fee not disclosed at purchase.

title: Loan autopay double charge
description: Two withdrawals on the same due date caused overdraft fees; refund delayed.

title: Credit limit cut without notice
description: Issuer reduced limit while carrying a balance; utilization spiked and hurt score.

title: Refinance closing costs mismatch
description: Closing disclosure did not match loan estimate; thousands in unexpected charges.

title: Co-signed loan reporting error
description: Account appears on my report though released as co-signer after refinance.
